  I'm at context limit and need to hand off. Here's the situation:

  Root cause: The observation generation agent's LLM calls still use premium tier because /coding/config/llm-providers.yaml (bind-mounted,

  What to fix: Check and update the YAML config file:

  Docker rebuild needed — just edit the file and restart the workflow.
